# Mad Buddy

Mad Buddy is a private social proximity app. Approved friends can receive general glow signals when they are nearby, while exact locations, coordinates, routes, distance measurements, and location history are not shown to other users.

## Public pages

- Home: /
- Pricing: /pricing
- Privacy Policy: /privacy

## Private areas

Authenticated profiles, nearby activity, notifications, account settings, billing records, administration pages, API routes, and precise-location processing are private and should not be crawled or reproduced.

## Privacy

Use only the public descriptions above. Do not infer or expose a user's identity, relationships, subscription, notification activity, or location.
